original_abstract: This research explores the complex challenges and shifting dynamics of entrepreneurship and innovation within the landscape of the digital era. As rapid technological advancements redefine traditional business models, this study utilizes a holistic mixed-methods framework—combining qualitative insights and quantitative analysis—to provide a comprehensive understanding of the digital transformation. By integrating perspectives on emerging technologies such as AI and e-commerce with practical strategies like cost leadership and digital collaboration, the research identifies the unique barriers and opportunities faced by modern entrepreneurs. Ultimately, these findings offer in-depth insights intended to help business owners, policymakers, and stakeholders navigate market uncertainties and refine their strategic approaches in an increasingly connected global economy.
humanized_abstract: Entrepreneurship and Innovation in the Digital Age The study focuses on the challenges and dynamics of entrepreneurship and innovation in the digital age. It is conducted using a holistic mixed-methods approach, drawing on qualitative and quantitative methods, and aiming at providing a complete view of the impact of digital age on businesses and accordingly on society. Therefore, it draws on emerging trends in the technology industry such as AI and e-commerce as well as different business strategies including cost leadership and digital collaboration and hence on the challenges and opportunities it faces thereby aiming to help entrepreneurs, business leaders, governments and various stakeholders to gain deeper and more profound knowledge, in the hope of enabling them to deal with the dramatic changes and challenges that businesses are facing in a rapidly interconnected and globalised world.
